description: Deep, multi-pass code review of git branches powered by Claude Code CLI. Reasons, questions itself, explores alternatives. Precise file/line anchoring with applicable fixes. No API key required — uses your local Claude Code.
cmd.reviewBranch: Claude Review: Review Branch vs Base
cmd.reviewCurrentBranch: Claude Review: Review Current Branch vs main
cmd.retryPass: Claude Review: Retry a Single Pass
cmd.setLanguageEn: Claude Review: Set Panel Language to English
cmd.setLanguageEs: Claude Review: Set Panel Language to Spanish
view.container.title: Claude Review
config.title: Claude Branch Reviewer
config.claudeCliPath: Path to the Claude Code CLI binary. Leave as 'claude' if it's on your PATH.
config.model: Optional --model override passed to the Claude CLI (e.g. 'opus', 'sonnet'). Empty = let the CLI decide.
config.translationModel: Optional --model override used only for per-finding on-demand translations (typically a fast/cheap model like 'haiku'). Empty = use the same model as 'model'.
config.baseBranch: Default base branch (e.g. main, master, develop). Leave empty to auto-detect.
config.maxDiffBytes: Maximum diff size in bytes. Larger diffs are chunked file-by-file.
config.passes: Which analysis passes to run. structural lets Claude grep/read the repo to gather context before reviewing. accessibility runs only when UI/CSS files are in the diff. gaps audits what the author probably should have touched but didn't.
config.reasoningDepth: How hard Claude should think. 'obsessive' permutes alternatives and self-critiques every finding.
config.includeUntracked: Include untracked files in the review.
config.contextFiles: Project files Claude should always read for context.
config.ignoreGlobs: Glob patterns of files to exclude from review.
config.cliTimeoutMs: How long to wait for each Claude CLI invocation before timing out (ms).
